If you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSettings/useLockInterval] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSettings/lockInterval] to `INT_MAX` to indicate that the keychain never locks.

# lockInterval

**Instance Property**

The number of seconds to wait before the keychain locks.

## Declaration

```swift
var lockInterval: UInt32
```

## Discussion

If you set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSettings/useLockInterval] to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false], set [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSettings/lockInterval] to `INT_MAX` to indicate that the keychain never locks.
title: lockInterval
